evidence_pool.content: Acme Corp SA, registered on 15 March 2010, Registration No. CHE-123.456.789. Registered office: Bahnhofstrasse 42, 8001 Zürich, Switzerland. Purpose: Financial services, asset management, and investment advisory.
evidence_pool.title: Acme Corp SA - Commercial Registry Extract

evidence_pool.content: Board of Directors: Hans Mueller (Chairman), Maria Schmidt (CEO), Pierre Dubois (CFO). The company maintains subsidiaries in Luxembourg and Singapore. Revenue breakdown: Asset Management (45%), Securities Trading (35%), Advisory Services (20%). Total AUM: CHF 2.3 billion.
evidence_pool.title: Acme Corp SA Annual Report 2023

evidence_pool.content: Ultimate Beneficial Owners: Mueller Family Trust (45%), Schmidt Holdings AG (30%), Public shareholders (25%). Mueller Family Trust is controlled by Hans Mueller (Swiss national, DOB 1965).
evidence_pool.title: Ownership Structure Filing

evidence_pool.content: Acme Corp SA holds a securities dealer license (Category 2) issued by FINMA on 01 July 2012. License status: Active. Last supervision date: December 2023.
evidence_pool.title: FINMA Licensed Institutions Register

evidence_pool.content: In 2019, Acme Corp SA received a warning letter from FINMA regarding delayed suspicious activity reporting. The company has since enhanced its compliance procedures.
evidence_pool.title: Swiss Financial News - Regulatory Updates

evidence_pool.content: Search performed for: Acme Corp SA, Hans Mueller, Maria Schmidt, Pierre Dubois, Mueller Family Trust, Schmidt Holdings AG. No matches found in OFAC SDN List.
evidence_pool.title: OFAC Sanctions Search Results

evidence_pool.content: Financial services companies in Switzerland with securities dealer licenses carry moderate inherent risk. Key factors: jurisdiction risk (low for Switzerland), product complexity (medium), client base diversity.
evidence_pool.title: Internal Risk Assessment Framework

evidence_pool.content: Acme Corp SA provides wealth management, investment advisory, and securities trading services to institutional and high-net-worth clients across Europe and Asia.
evidence_pool.title: Acme Corp SA Website - About Us

shared_registry.canonical_interpretation: Acme Corp SA Annual Report 2023 provides corporate governance information relevant to both ownership structure analysis and risk assessment through its disclosure of management, subsidiaries, and financial metrics.
Ownership structure filing establishes the UBO framework and is relevant to both corporate structure documentation and risk assessment due to concentration of control.
The 2019 FINMA warning letter represents a historical compliance issue that informs both regulatory history assessment and ongoing risk evaluation.
